subject: docs(claude): close final two align drifts — HMR tip + Documentation ordering
body:
Follow-up to commit e99afb7 (six-point align fix). Running `align` again
surfaced two residual minor drifts between this repo's CLAUDE.md and
glow-props' — both applied.

1. Code Standards → Timer and Subscription Cleanup: kept the repo-local
   `__debugLogListenersAttached` example citation AND added back the
   `import.meta.hot.dispose()` tip from glow-props. Sun-sea-o is a
   Vite project that exposes `import.meta.hot`, so the release-on-HMR
   advice is directly applicable; losing it in the earlier swap was a
   minor regression.

2. Documentation section ordering: moved `README.md` from position 2
   (right after CLAUDE.md) down to position 6 (after AI_MISTAKES.md)
   to match glow-props' order exactly:
     CLAUDE → SESSION_NOTES → TODO → USER_ACTIONS → AI_MISTAKES →
     README → USER_GUIDE → TESTING_GUIDE.
   Cosmetic change; all entries were present, just reordered.

Tags: docs, alignment, claude-md
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: fleet-alignment
Semver: patch
